typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		UID as string,
		DB_ID as long,
		ValidatedDate as date
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'parquet') ~> tblPrismaEnrichedTCOOTDATA
tblPrismaEnrichedTCOOTDATA sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'parquet',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		UID,
		DB_ID,
		ValidatedDate
	)) ~> OLEDBDestination
